TEXT.source: Seediq Wikipedia, article: 布嵐部落
TEXT.citation: 布嵐部落. (2025, May 05). In Wikipedia [Seediq]. https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/布嵐部落
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_布嵐部落, title = 布嵐部落, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/布嵐部落} }

S.FORM: (Plngawan) Inago alang Pulan( Qeycing)"如圖1" Tnlangan) " Tnlangan的上方(族人稱之為alang daya) "如圖3", ,譬如Bling utux處.最後,約民國48 Hanabay) "如圖4"至今. ".
S.PHON: (plŋawan) inago alaŋ pulan( qəʦiŋ)"***" tnlaŋan) " tnlaŋan***(*****alaŋ daja) "***", ,**bliŋ utux*.**,***** ħanabaj) "***"**. ".
S.FORM: (Plngawan) Inago alang Pulan( Qeycing)"如圖1" Tnlangan) " Tnlangan的上方(族人稱之為alang daya) "如圖3", ,譬如Bling utux處.最後,約民國48 Hanabay) "如圖4"至今. ".
S.PHON: (plŋawan) inago alaŋ pulan( qəʦiŋ)"***" tnlaŋan) " tnlaŋan***(*****alaŋ daja) "***", ,**bliŋ utux*.**,***** ħanabaj) "***"**. ".
